summary: 2 film announcements, 3 TV announcements across 5 trades.

film.title: Romy & Michele Sequel
film.announcement: Mira Sorvino marks first day of filming for the Romy & Michele sequel, confirming production has begun.

film.title: Get Jiro
film.announcement: Warner Bros. Animation sneak peeks 'Get Jiro' at the Annecy Adult Animation Showcase.

tv.title: Dark Shadows Animated Series
tv.announcement: Warner Bros. Animation announces a Dark Shadows animated series at the Annecy Adult Animation Showcase.

tv.title: Hit Squad
tv.announcement: Warner Bros. Animation teases Gerry Anderson's 'Hit Squad' at the Annecy Adult Animation Showcase.

tv.title: Life, Larry
tv.announcement: Larry David's new HBO sketch comedy series 'Life, Larry' is in development, with details on Obama's notes and the show's creative process revealed.
